title: FinnGen Workbench Sessions
description: Manage your FinnGen interactive analysis sessions. Each session provides an isolated computing environment for running polygenic risk score calculations, colocalization analyses, and custom genomic queries against FinnGen summary statistics.
tips: Create a new session to start an interactive analysis — sessions persist for 24 hours after last activity.
Resume an existing session to continue work from where you left off without re-uploading data.
Each session has a dedicated R environment with pre-installed HADES and genomics packages.
Sessions are isolated per user — collaborate by exporting results to a shared study rather than sharing sessions.
Completed sessions show a summary of outputs produced, which can be downloaded or linked to a Parthenon study.
